title: Sci Fi Cinematic Campaign Keyframe AI
sourceTitle: Sci Fi Cinematic Campaign Keyframe AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Hero Subject: Astra Vey and Nyx, two fictional cyber duelists in white-silver exosuits channeling critical energy. Scene / Context: glass atrium station core going critical, plasma ribbons and violet accents, no gore. Source Recipe Translation: sci-fi cinematic campaign keyframe. Preserve these source mechanics: cinematic sci-fi action keyframe, glossy exosuits, plasma light, station overload glow, premium game trailer still. Concrete social variant uses Astra Vey and Nyx, two fictional cyber duelists in white-silver exosuits channeling critical energy in glass atrium station core going critical, plasma ribbons and violet accents, no gore. Composition: vertical 4:5 or 2:3 social-poster composition with a strong central focal subject and clean negative space; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 unless the source layout requires otherwise; keep the main subject readable in a small thumbnail and center-safe for X crop previews. Style System: cinematic sci-fi action keyframe, glossy exosuits, plasma light, station overload glow, premium game trailer still; polished editorial finish, strong first-glance contrast, clean hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: GLASS TIDE / PHASE II; English-only readable text if text is part of the design; otherwise no visible text. Social Safety and Publishing Constraints: fictionalized social-safe version of the source prompt; adult-safe styling; real brands, logos, teams, and public-figure likenesses replaced with fictional/generic equivalents; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter.
